properties.name: build
properties.description: Builds the buttery-tokens based upon the set configuration
properties.help:
[1m[4mUsage:[24m[22m
  buttery build [--options]

[1m[4mDescription:[24m[22m
  Builds the buttery-tokens based upon the set configuration

[1m[4mOptions:[24m[22m
  --help, -h  Display the help menu [boolean] [2m(optional)[22m
  --log-level, -l  Set's the log level [string] [2m(optional, (default: info))[22m

properties.name: studio
properties.description: Launches the interactive tokens studio in a local development environment

port.description: The port the studio will run from on localhost

properties.help:
[1m[4mUsage:[24m[22m
  buttery studio [--options]

[1m[4mDescription:[24m[22m
  Launches the interactive tokens studio in a local development environment

[1m[4mOptions:[24m[22m
  --help, -h  Display the help menu [boolean] [2m(optional)[22m
  --log-level, -l  Set's the log level [string] [2m(optional, (default: info))[22m
  --port, -p  The port the studio will run from on localhost [number] [2m(optional, (default: 5700))[22m

properties.name: add
properties.description: Scaffold new buttery-tokens assets into your .keystone/ directory
properties.help:
[1m[4mUsage:[24m[22m
  buttery add [--options]

[1m[4mDescription:[24m[22m
  Scaffold new buttery-tokens assets into your .keystone/ directory

[1m[4mOptions:[24m[22m
  --help, -h  Display the help menu [boolean] [2m(optional)[22m

properties.name: dev
properties.description: Watches for changes in the configuration and re-builds the tokens
properties.help:
[1m[4mUsage:[24m[22m
  buttery dev [--options]

[1m[4mDescription:[24m[22m
  Watches for changes in the configuration and re-builds the tokens

[1m[4mOptions:[24m[22m
  --help, -h  Display the help menu [boolean] [2m(optional)[22m
  --log-level, -l  Set's the log level [string] [2m(optional, (default: info))[22m

properties.name: keystone
properties.description: Auto-generate TS functional utilities to easily recall & implement CSS design tokens
properties.help:
[1m[4mUsage:[24m[22m
  buttery <subcommand>

[1m[4mDescription:[24m[22m
  Auto-generate TS functional utilities to easily recall & implement CSS design tokens

[1m[4mSub-commands:[24m[22m
  build    Builds the buttery-tokens based upon the set configuration
  studio   Launches the interactive tokens studio in a local development environment
  add      Scaffold new buttery-tokens assets into your .keystone/ directory
  dev      Watches for changes in the configuration and re-builds the tokens
  buttery  Auto-generate TS functional utilities to easily recall & implement CSS design tokens
